display_title: Slay the Spire 2:Ranwid the Elder
wikitext:
{{Event Header|StS2 Ranwid The Elder.png}} {{E|Ranwid the Elder|2}} is an {{2|Events|Event}} found exclusively in {{2|Glory}}. == Options == {{Frame|Give Potion}} {{TS|positive||Obtain a random {{2|Relics|Relic}}.}} {{Frame|Give 100 Gold}} {{TS|positive||Obtain a random {{2|Relics|Relic}}.}} {{Frame|Give }} {{TS|positive||Obtain 2 random {{2|Relics|Relics}}.}} == Dialogue ==
You are approached by the {{TS|purple||oldest person you have ever seen}}. "We meet once more... it's me, Ranwid!" You do not know this man. {{Frame|Give Potion}}
"Exquisite..." {{TS|blue||Glup glup glup}} He downs the {{TS|gold|| Potion}} in one go.
== Notes == Ranwid seems to be the same character found in {{E|We Meet Again!}}. [[Category:Events]] [[Category:Slay the Spire 2 Content]]
